title: The Pharaohs' Woman
writer: Remigio Del Grosso, Ugo Liberatore, Virgilio Tosi
actors: Linda Cristal, Pierre Brice, Armando Francioli
plot: A beautiful girl and a young physician fall in love in the midst of a family, and power struggle between rival princes of Upper and Lower Egypt. When all seems to turn to the better, a dejected woman gets her revenge, and the coup...
